fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Iowa Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to Iowa - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity iowa, how to transfer pharmacist license to iowa, pharmacist compact iowa, iowa pharmacist endorsement application

board.name: Iowa Board of Pharmacy
board.parent_dept: Department of Inspections, Appeals, and Licensing (DIAL)
board.mailing_address: Iowa Board of Pharmacy, 400 SW 8th Street, Suite E, Des Moines, IA 50309-4688

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in Iowa.

steps.title: Create IBPLive Account and Apply
steps.description: Register for an account and complete the Pharmacist License by Endorsement application through the IBPLive online system.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Follow the instructions provided within the IBPLive application to complete the required criminal background check.

steps.title: Pass Iowa MPJE
steps.description: Register for and pass the Iowa Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) administered by the National Association of Boards of Pharmacy (NABP).

steps.title: Submit NABP Attestation & Verification
steps.description: Request an Official Attestation of Licensure for each pharmacist license held via your NABP e-Profile and ensure all required licensure verifications are submitted to the Iowa Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documentation
steps.description: Upload official transcripts from your ACPE-accredited school (or FPGEE results for foreign graduates) and any required Continuing Education documentation as instructed in your IBPLive application.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a Iowa pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does Iowa have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in Iowa. To work in Iowa, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to Iowa?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Iowa while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in Iowa
hero.dek: Pharmacist licensing applications in Iowa are processed through the IBPLive online system, which is where you will create an account and submit your application for licensure by endorsement.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: How to transfer your existing credential from another state

variants.label: Renewal
variants.description: How to renew your existing credential

official_links.registration_steps: 1. Navigate to the IBPLive portal. 2. Click on "New User? Register Now" to create a new account. 3. Complete the registration form with your personal details and create a unique username and password. 4. Once registered, log in to your account to access the application services.
